generated_exposure.exposure_text: New evidence shows foreign actors are exploiting domestic legal loopholes to undermine our national security. While we value civil liberties, we can't afford to be naive. Strengthening domestic security powers isn't about restricting freedoms—it's about closing dangerous gaps that put us all at risk. Our allies are already taking similar steps. #SecureOurFuture #NationalSecurityFirst
